examples: The dying man blessed his son

meanings.definition: make the sign of the cross over someone in order to call on God for protection; consecrate
render holy by means of religious rites
highly favored or fortunate (as e.g. by divine grace)
examples: the blessed assurance of a steady income
I'll be damned (or blessed or darned or goddamned) if I'll do any such thing
he's a damn (or goddam or goddamned) fool

meanings.definition: Roman Catholic; proclaimed one of the blessed and thus worthy of veneration
characterized by happiness and good fortune
